problem_context.expected_behavior: For a non-null sentinel whose next and prev fields are owned, write both fields to the sentinel address, preserve exclusive ownership of exactly those fields, allocate/free nothing, and establish the canonical empty circular doubly linked list predicate.
forbidden_patterns: Pure pointer equalities without separation ownership.
Only one direction of the doubly linked sentinel.
problem_context.input_output_contract: Precondition owns both pointer fields with arbitrary old values. Postcondition is a separation predicate whose unfolding owns node_next=head and node_prev=head; no field ownership may be dropped or duplicated.
problem_context.problem_statement: Verify the simplest circular doubly linked list initializer with complete functional and memory correctness. INPUT stays annotation-free; only the Verification copy may contain QCP annotations.
reference_case_hints: Use only QCP_examples/QCP_demos_LLM singly-linked predicate style as an annotation style reference; adapt to two sentinel fields.
spec_hint: Use a predicate-first empty circular DLL predicate. The result must capture both functional self-links and spatial ownership.
